title: hieracium murorum subsp. canonigrum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. canonigrum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. canonigrum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. canonigrum are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical treatments.
